mapper.select: SELECT session_id AS id, member_id AS memberId, game_type AS logType, total_try_count AS totalTryCount, correct_count AS correctCount, wrong_count AS wrongCount, timeout_count AS timeoutCount, total_played_time AS totalPlayedTime, created_at AS createdAt FROM daily_game_log WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND game_type = #{gameType} AND is_valid = true ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT daily_question_log_id AS id, member_id AS memberId, 'QUESTION' AS logType, response_second AS responseSecond, created_at AS createdAt FROM daily_question_log WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND response_second < 180 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT member_id AS memberId, alert_type AS alertType, metric_scope AS metricScope, consecutive_count AS consecutiveCount, last_sent_at AS lastSentAt, last_activity_at AS lastActivityAt FROM alert_state WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND alert_type = #{alertType} AND metric_scope = #{metricScope}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_state ( member_id, alert_type, metric_scope, consecutive_count, last_sent_at, last_activity_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{alertType}, #{metricScope}, #{consecutiveCount}, #{lastSentAt}, #{lastActivityAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE consecutive_count = VALUES(consecutive_count), last_sent_at = VALUES(last_sent_at), last_activity_at = VALUES(last_activity_at)
INSERT INTO alert_history ( member_id, alert_type, metric_scope, status, reason, created_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{alertType}, #{metricScope}, #{status}, #{reason}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT guardian_email FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND guardian_consent = true
